calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-14-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: A. James Robertson, II. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6048. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Francisco G. Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation.
Tiona Mitchell, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Georgia Jenkins.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on November 21, 2018.
Defendant Georgina Jenkins' answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed December 4, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on December 27, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, January 14, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation, and against defendant Georgina Jenkins, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $944.00.
Holdover Damages - $880.00.
Costs - $450.00.
Total: $2,274.88.

Additionally, plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 44 McAllister Street, Unit #819, San Francisco, CA 94102.

The Lease is Forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-14-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Charles F. Haines; Clerk: N. Wong; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Decelopment is present. Represented by Tonia Mitchell.
Attorney Francisco Torres appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Georgina Jenkins is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of January 14, 2019 remains on calendar.
